name: LA Healthcare FCU
description_short: LA Healthcare FCU is a not-for-profit federal credit union serving healthcare professionals and employees at PIH Health Good Samaritan Hospital and California Hospital Medical Center with competitive banking and lending products.
description_long:
LA Healthcare Federal Credit Union (LAHFCU) is a not-for-profit financial cooperative established to serve the specific financial needs of healthcare professionals and their families, with particular focus on employees of PIH Health Good Samaritan Hospital and California Hospital Medical Center in Los Angeles. As a member-owned institution, LAHFCU operates on the credit union model where profits are returned to members through lower loan rates and competitive dividend rates on savings accounts rather than being distributed to external shareholders.

LAHFCU offers a comprehensive suite of banking and lending products including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit, money market accounts, auto loans (including hybrid and EV vehicles), personal loans, VISA credit cards, mortgage loans, and specialized loan products like title loans, share-secured loans, lines of credit, and holiday/vacation loans. The credit union also provides consumer convenience services such as online and mobile banking, mobile pay, a 24/7 audio teller system, 24/7 call center support, identity theft protection, and GAP insurance on vehicle loans. Their current promotional offerings include auto loans starting at 4.50% APR with payment deferral options and skip-a-pay features allowing members to defer payments for a $29 monthly processing fee.

The institution distinguishes itself through its exclusive membership requirement tied to healthcare employment, positioning itself as a specialized financial partner for medical professionals rather than a general-market lender. Their focus on this niche market allows them to tailor products specifically to healthcare workers' financial patterns and needs. LAHFCU emphasizes member education through financial literacy resources and maintains a commitment to competitive rates and exceptional service quality backed by ongoing staff training.

As a credit union serving a specific employment sector, LAHFCU is best suited for eligible healthcare employees at their partner hospitals seeking member-owned banking with lower rates and competitive terms. The primary limitation is membership eligibility—individuals must work at or have family connections to the specified healthcare institutions. While their product offerings are comprehensive, their size and focus as a specialized credit union means fewer physical locations and potentially fewer advanced digital features compared to major national banks. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Not-for-profit structure returns profits to members through lower loan rates and competitive savings dividends
Auto loans start at 4.50% APR with up to 84 months and up to 90 days no payment option
Skip-A-Pay feature allows loan payment deferral for small $29 monthly fee
Personal loans available from $1K-$15K with competitive 12-72 month terms
Comprehensive service suite including 24/7 audio teller and call center support
Specialized focus on healthcare professionals' financial needs with tailored products
Youth savings accounts and financial education programs for members' families
cons: Membership restricted to employees of specific hospitals (PIH Health Good Samaritan Hospital and California Hospital Medical Center) and their families
Limited geographic reach as a single-location credit union compared to national banks
No physical branch information provided on website, suggesting minimal in-person banking options
Personal loans capped at $15,000 maximum, limiting options for larger personal financing needs
Skip-A-Pay comes with recurring $29 monthly fee that can add significant cost over time
best_for: Healthcare employees at PIH Health Good Samaritan Hospital or California Hospital Medical Center seeking member-owned banking
Medical professionals wanting competitive auto loan rates and flexible payment deferral options
Healthcare workers looking for specialized financial products tailored to medical industry employment patterns
Families of eligible healthcare employees seeking comprehensive banking and youth savings options
diagnosis: LA Healthcare FCU is best for healthcare employees at its partner Los Angeles hospitals who want member-owned banking with competitive rates and specialized products. The critical caveat is strict membership eligibility limited to employees of PIH Health Good Samaritan Hospital and California Hospital Medical Center; individuals outside this employment base cannot access membership regardless of their creditworthiness.
services: Checking accounts with direct deposit options
Savings accounts and certificates of deposit
Youth checking and kids savings accounts
Auto loans for new, used, and refinance vehicles (including hybrid and EV)
VISA credit cards with rewards program
Online and mobile banking with mobile pay
24/7 audio teller and call center support
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: Lobby, 1245 Wilshire Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90017
meta_description: Not-for-profit federal credit union serving healthcare professionals at PIH Health with competitive banking products.
